fullText:
SL Coaster (Japanese: SLコースター) was a steel roller coaster previously located at Yomiuriland in Inagi, Tokyo, Japan.

The coaster would dive down after the station, completing the layout and ending with the chain lift hill.

White track and supports.

The train is designed to resemble an engine.


 * SL Coaster on the parks website (Japanese)
